note: Hand-authored card layout, NOT a buildable package or Storybook. This folder is already in the Claude Design upload layout: tokens.css at root + components/<slug>/index.html preview cards, each with a first-line @dsCard marker linking ../../tokens.css. No converter (no dist/, no package.json). Sync = direct DesignSync upload of tokens.css + every components/**/index.html + fonts/**. Cards carry @dsCard markers so register_assets is NOT needed.
